name: Tater-Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup mashed potatoes, made with milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Wash mushrooms and carefully remove stems. Set aside the tops of the mushrooms.
3. Chop the stems.
4. Combine the chopped stems with the remaining ingredients, except for the margarine. Spoon the mixture onto the mushroom tops.
5. Grease the bottom of a jelly roll pan with margarine.
6. Arrange the mushrooms on the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 15 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Serve immediately.
Makes 30 stuffed caps, about 15 calories each.
